channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James scores 31 in record 19th Christmas Day game as Lakers hold off Curry, Warriors 115-113
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Austin Reaves scored the winning layup with one second left after Stephen Curry tied it on a 31-foot 3-pointer with seven seconds remaining, LeBron James had 31 points and 10 assists playing in his NBA-record 19th Christmas Day game, and the Los Angeles Lakers held off the Golde
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Defending champion LawConnect takes early lead in Sydney to Hobart yacht race
item.description: Defending line honors champion LawConnect led the Sydney to Hobart yacht fleet out of Sydney harbor at the start of the 79th running of the 628-nautical mile (722 miles, 1,160 kilometers) race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jackson breaks Vick's NFL rushing record for QBs in Ravens' rout over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson passed Michael Vick for the most rushing yards by a quarterback in NFL history in a 31-2 victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. “Michael Vick, one of my favorite players,” Jackson said. “That’s just dope.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Texans look for answers after embarrassing 31-2 home loss to the Ravens
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Quarterback C.J. Stroud summed up Houston’s performance in an embarrassing 31-2 loss to Baltimore on Wednesday. “Sometimes you go out there and lay an egg,” Stroud said. “It’s not easy to say that, but that’s what happened. Didn’t play well from the first play to the last.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in the Baltimore Ravens' victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. A highlight came when Jackson dashed 48 yards for a touchdown on a run where he reached a career-best top speed of 21.25 mph.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Victor Wembanyama scores 42 in a memorable Christmas debut but Spurs fall short against the Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Victor Wembanyama nearly obliterated the Spurs' Christmas record book in his first time playing on the holiday. Nearly won the game, too.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No Christmas miracle for San Jose State: Takeaways from a wild Hawaii Bowl loss
item.description: San Jose State erased an 11-point halftime deficit but couldn't beat South Florida in a five-overtime thriller.
item.dc:creator: Christian Vieyra, The Mercury News

item.title: Devils pull off ultimate troll job on Rangers during dominant victory
item.description: As the New York Rangers' season continues to unravel, the New Jersey Devils had a grand old time poking fun at their Hudson River rivals on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship in Orlando
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls beat Celtics 117-108 in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brock Purdy gets his offensive line new cars for Christmas
item.description: (KRON) -- It's the most wonderful time of the year -- especially if you're a San Francisco 49ers offensive lineman. Quarterback Brock Purdy hooked the big dawgs up with brand-new Toyota cars, a video posted by the 49ers on Thursday showed.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Real Salt Lake's 2025 MLS season kicks off Feb. 22 with away game in San Jose
item.description: Real Salt Lake unveiled its entire 2025 MLS Season on Thursday, along with a few crucial dates such as the club's return to the CONCACAF Champions Cup.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4
